chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-2198 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For order on office objection. For hearing of case. 01.01.2026 Mr. Muhammad Fazil Rind advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, A.A.G. Sindh along with SIP Faheem Hussain on behalf of DIGP Hyderabad and ASI Nisar Ahmed on behalf of SHO PS Thana Bula Khan. This petition was filed for the recovery of the alleged detainees, namely Mst. Lal Khatoon, Raj Bibi and minor Sakina. However, learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the alleged detainees have now surfaced; therefore, the grievance of the petitioner stands redressed and the purpose of filing this petition has been achieved. He, therefore, seeks disposal of the instant petition, which is accordingly hereby disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
